data.content:
Now I have the full picture. Let me resolve conflicts (highest version wins) and create the CPM setup.

**Conflicts resolved:**
- `System.Text.Json`: 10.0.1 vs 8.0.4 → **10.0.1**
- `Azure.Identity`: 1.13.2 vs 1.11.4 → **1.13.2**

arguments.file_text:
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Azure.Identity" Version="1.13.2" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting" Version="1.15.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a clear picture. Let me identify all packages and their versions across projects:

| Package | Api | Worker | Shared | Tests |
|---------|-----|--------|--------|-------|
| System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 | 8.0.4 | 10.0.1 | 10.0.1 |
| Azure.Identity | 1.13.2 | - | 1.11.4 | - |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | - | 8.0.1 | - | - |
| OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | - | 1.15.0 | - | - |


| xunit | - | - | - | 2.9.3 |

I've spotted version conflicts with System.Text.Json and Azure.Identity that need resolving, so I'll go with the newer versions. My approach is to centralize package management by creating a Directory.Packages.props file at the solution root with all version definitions, then strip out the individual version attributes from each project file.

</Project>

data.content:
Done. Created `Directory.Packages.props` with Central Package Management enabled and resolved two version conflicts using the highest version:

| Package | Conflict | Resolved |
|---|---|---|
| `System.Text.Json` | 10.0.1 vs 8.0.4 | **10.0.1** |
| `Azure.Identity` | 1.13.2 vs 1.11.4 | **1.13.2** |

All `Version` attributes have been removed from `PackageReference` entries in the 4 `.csproj` files. The 5 unique packages are now centrally managed in `Directory.Packages.props`.
